evidence.description: EditorPane now wrapped in <div class='editor-main'> but spec REQ-FEED-023:529 still requires <main class='editor-main'>. Spec not updated to reflect fix for FIND-S2-02.
REQ-FEED-020 handler parameter table still shows old 3-argument signatures for select_past_note and confirm_note_deletion; implementation now has vault_path and file_path added.
FIND-S2-03 resolved: YamlKey state-machine tests added for aliases-before-tags, references-before-tags, aliases-after-tags. All three multi-key scenarios correctly prevent cross-contamination.
FIND-S2-07 resolved: CRLF body extraction test parse_frontmatter_metadata_crlf_body_has_no_leading_cr confirms body_skip=6 for CRLF delimiter. Combined CRLF+multiline tags test also passes.

FIND-S2-05 resolved: make_editing_state_changed_snapshot now calls scan_vault_feed(vault_path). Test make_editing_state_changed_snapshot_populates_feed_from_vault confirms non-empty visibleNoteIds when vault has .md files.

FIND-S2-06 resolved: make_note_deleted_snapshot and make_deletion_failed_snapshot both call scan_vault_feed. Test make_note_deleted_snapshot_populates_remaining_feed_after_deletion confirms remaining notes appear in snapshot.

FIND-S2-01 resolved: confirm_note_deletion now accepts distinct file_path and note_id parameters. fs_trash_file_impl called with &file_path, not &note_id. fs_trash_file_impl_uses_file_path_not_note_id test confirms the separation.

Shell correctly fills vault_path and file_path placeholders before calling adapter. resolvedFilePath falls back to cmd.payload.noteId for backward compat (identity assumption now explicit and documented).

FIND-S2-02 resolved: +page.svelte no longer emits <main> inside AppShell slot. Layout uses <div class='layout'> + <aside class='feed-sidebar'> + <div class='editor-main'>. No nested <main> in the DOM.
AppShell.svelte:95 still renders <main> in Configured state; +page.svelte slot content is now all divs. HTML5 single-<main> invariant is satisfied.
All 6 feed commands registered in invoke_handler: select_past_note, request_note_deletion, confirm_note_deletion, cancel_note_deletion, fs_trash_file, feed_initial_state.
TS adapter interface and implementation correctly updated to match Rust command signatures with vault_path and file_path arguments.

FIND-S2-04 resolved: Tests now mount actual FeedList component (not manually constructed DOM). Three real behavioral assertions: empty-state render, note-row render with populated viewState, vaultPath prop wiring. Two source-read tests verify grid-template-columns and #e9e9e7 presence in +page.svelte.

FIND-S2-01/05/06 Rust behavioral tests added: fs_trash_file_impl_uses_file_path_not_note_id (file path vs note_id separation), make_editing_state_changed_snapshot_populates_feed_from_vault (non-empty visibleNoteIds), make_note_deleted_snapshot_populates_remaining_feed_after_deletion (remaining notes present).
5 new unit tests for FIND-S2-03 and FIND-S2-07: three YamlKey state-machine tests plus two CRLF tests. All are behavioral, not tautological.

iter1ResolutionSummary.FIND-S2-01: RESOLVED — confirm_note_deletion has explicit file_path parameter; fs_trash_file_impl called with &file_path; TS adapter updated; behavioral test added
iter1ResolutionSummary.FIND-S2-02: RESOLVED — +page.svelte uses <div class='editor-main'>, double-<main> eliminated; NOTE: spec REQ-FEED-023 text not updated (see FIND-S2-08)
iter1ResolutionSummary.FIND-S2-03: RESOLVED — YamlKey state machine correctly scopes list items to tags key; 3 cross-contamination tests added
iter1ResolutionSummary.FIND-S2-04: RESOLVED — Tests mount actual FeedList; source-read assertions replace tautological expect(true)
iter1ResolutionSummary.FIND-S2-05: RESOLVED — make_editing_state_changed_snapshot calls scan_vault_feed; vault_path added to select_past_note; NOTE: spec REQ-FEED-020 table not updated (see FIND-S2-09)
iter1ResolutionSummary.FIND-S2-06: RESOLVED — all three snapshot constructors call scan_vault_feed; test confirms remaining notes visible after deletion
iter1ResolutionSummary.FIND-S2-07: RESOLVED — body_skip variable is 5 for LF, 6 for CRLF; CRLF test confirms no leading CR in body
